zh.Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾歐艾金頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III是Thomas Leete II和Mrs Thomas Leete的兒子，於1554年11月12日出生在英國坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。他於1574年6月2日與Maria Slade在英國英格蘭肯特多丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1616年11月12日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III是Thomas Leete II和Mrs Thomas Leete的儿子，于1554年11月12日出生在英国坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。他于1574年6月2日与Maria Slade在英国英格兰肯特多丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1616年11月12日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III was born on 12 November 1554, in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England as the son of Thomas Leete II and Mrs Thomas Leete. He married Maria Slade on 2 June 1574, in Doddington, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 November 1616, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III est né le 12 novembre 1554, à Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, fils de Thomas Leete II et Mrs Thomas Leete. Il a épousé Maria Slade le 2 juin 1574, à Doddington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III wurde am 12. November 1554 in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, als Sohn von Thomas Leete II und Mrs Thomas Leete geboren. Er hat am 2. Juni 1574 in Doddington, Kent, England, United Kingdom Maria Slade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1616 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III è nato il il 12 novembre 1554 nel Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England come figlio di Thomas Leete II e Mrs Thomas Leete. Lui sposato Maria Slade il 2 giugno 1574, nel Doddington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete IIIは1554年11月12日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアオアキントンでThomas Leete IIとMrs Thomas Leeteの息子として生まれた。1574年6月2日にイギリスイギリスケントドッドイントンでMaria Sladeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1616年11月12日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアオアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III(은)는 1554년 11월 12일 영국 캄브리지실르 킨그턴에서 Thomas Leete II(와)과 Mrs Thomas Leete의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1574년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도딩턴에서 Maria Slade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1616년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 November 1554–12 November 1616: 12 de novembro de 1554–12 de novembro de 1616
pt.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III nasceu em 12 de novembro de 1554, em Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Leete II e Mrs Thomas Leete. Ele casou-se com Maria Slade em 2 de junho de 1574, em Doddington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III родился 12 ноября 1554 г. в местности оакингтон, камбриджешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Thomas Leete II и Mrs Thomas Leete. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Slade 2 июня 1574 г. в местности доддингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 ноября 1616 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности оакингтон, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.12 November 1554–12 November 1616: 12 de noviembre de 1554–12 de noviembre de 1616
es.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Leete III nació el 12 de noviembre de 1554, en Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Leete II y Mrs Thomas Leete. Se casó con Maria Slade el 2 de junio de 1574, en Doddington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1616, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
